rows.notes: Clear centered year at top of page; no monetary amounts present. Ink and numerals fully legible.
Clear section title immediately under the year. No amounts in this header line.
Pounds (324) and shillings (10) are well aligned in their columns; pence column is empty (interpreted as 0d). Vertical ruling lines and digits are unambiguous.
Pounds (595) and shillings (3) are clear. A small mark appears in the pence column that resembles a '2' but is slightly faint/smudged; read as 2d with moderate confidence.
Pounds (643) and shillings (1) are well aligned and legible. No pence mark visible, taken as 0d. Small flourish in handwriting but alignment with ruling lines is clear.
Pounds (68) and shillings (3) clearly written in respective columns; pence column blank (0d). The surname 'Hammond' is legible. Column alignment is unambiguous.

rows.description: Entrance fees from Mr Bradford & to Mr. Hakewlle inclusive
rows.notes: The three digits '175' are positioned in the pounds column (not split as 1/7/5), so read as £175. No shillings or pence visible. Handwriting of names is slightly cramped but numeric alignment supports this reading.
Clear three-column amount: 28 (pounds), 6 (shillings), 3 (pence). All digits align with the vertical ruling lines and are unambiguous.
Pounds (24) and shillings (16) clearly visible and correctly positioned. Pence column empty (0d). Very minor ink variation but digits readable.

There is a '15' visible to the right of the description but its horizontal alignment sits slightly right of the pounds column and more under the shillings column; interpreted here as 15s (0 pounds 15s 0d). Could alternatively be 15 pounds if alignment is misread; chosen shillings because the adjacent '15' for 'Sundries' below is clearly in the pounds column and this '15' sits noticeably to the left of that.
Three-column amount '15 0 3' is visible and well aligned: 15 pounds, 0 shillings, 3 pence. The pence '3' is slightly smaller but clearly placed in the pence column.
Final total is clearly written and underlined at the right ('1889 15 0'). Vertical ruling lines used to align the total; digits are unambiguous.
